Based on the README.md in the webapp project, here are all the API endpoints mentioned:

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/users` | List all users |
| `POST` | `/api/users` | Create a new user |
| `GET` | `/api/health` | Health check |

The README also mentions the project is a simple HTTP server for user management that uses a controller pattern with handler functions that take a `Request` and return a `Response`.
